Front door · one box · proof mission

Tell GoalOS what you want.
It builds the proof path.

No route hunting. No jargon required. Type a public-safe objective, and GoalOS locally drafts the mission contract, evidence plan, verifier mesh, decision state, route handoff, and downloadable receipt.

GoalOS

Ready. Describe the outcome you want. I will convert it into a public-safe proof mission and show the exact page to use next.

Output artifact: GoalOSCommandReceipt.

Browser-local demonstration. No account. No form submission. No wallet. No token approval. No analytics. No cookies. No browser storage. No network request from the console. No transaction broadcast. No production authority. No user data retained.

    What happens

    Objective → contract → proof → route.

    GoalOS Command Console is separate from the existing Mission Autopilot and Ask GoalOS pages. It is the front-and-center one-box experience for visitors who want the system to choose the right next proof path.

    ObjectiveMission ContractEvidence DocketVerifier MeshDecision StateRoute HandoffReceipt
    GoalOS Care Command

    Start with one objective.

    Tell GoalOS what you want. It prepares the proof path, answers questions locally, and routes you to the right page while every preserved page remains available.
